title: Revert "If you fail to open shm lock then attempt to create it"
body: Revert first of three SHM locking PRs

comments.body: Alright, going to merge revert stuff. We'll force CI runs once we have the branch in a good state.

@baude: changing LGTM is restricted to assignees, and assigning you to the PR failed.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2132#issuecomment-453239917):

>/lgtm


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
